## CommandDescriptor.mcpName property

Optional MCP tool name (snake\_case). Defaults to `toSnakeCase(name)`<!-- -->. Set this only when a tool needs a name that does not match the derivation rule (e.g. a domain-prefixed override like `omnifocus_eval`<!-- -->).

**Signature:**

```typescript
mcpName?: string;
```
